vocabulary.meaning: 通过实验/经验验证地（常出现在结果陈述中）
vocabulary.example: We empirically demonstrate that our method outperforms the baseline by 12% on GLUE.
vocabulary.note: 这个词是 paper 里 'we show' 的更严谨替代，暗示结果有实验支撑

vocabulary.meaning: 显著的、大幅的（比 significant 更强调量的差异）
vocabulary.example: The proposed architecture yields substantial improvements in convergence speed.
vocabulary.note: significant 被用烂了，substantial 更有冲击力且不涉及统计显著性

vocabulary.meaning: 不一致、差异（常用于 theory vs experiment 对比）
vocabulary.example: We attribute this discrepancy to the finite-precision nature of our numerical solver.
vocabulary.note: 比 difference 更正式，暗示理论上应该一致但实测有偏差

patterns.usage: 陈述实验结果 + 提出因果解释，常见于 Results & Discussion
指出问题 + 提出解决方案，开门见山，论文 'contribution' 的标准句式
variants: To address this limitation, we introduce ...
To overcome this challenge, we develop ...

tips.detail: 学术英语中，very important → crucial/essential，really large → substantial/considerable，quite good → promising/competitive
tips.example: ❌ The model performs very well. → ✅ The model achieves competitive performance.

tips.tip: 实验部分用过去时，客观事实用现在时
tips.detail: We conducted experiments on... (过去时，描述你做了什么) — Attention is computed as... (现在时，公式/事实永远成立)
tips.example: ✅ We trained on 8 GPUs. The model converges after 100k steps.
